title: Xtra Fluffy Jamaican Sweet Potato Casserole
description: A festive Jamaican dish featuring fresh thyme and sweet potatoes, perfect for a special occasion. This low-glycemic-friendly casserole is made with a bain-marie for extra fluffiness.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the sweet potatoes, thyme, coconut milk, eggs, melted butter, allspice, nutmeg, salt, and black pepper, and mix well.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and place it in a larger baking dish.
Add hot water to the larger baking dish to come halfway up the sides of the smaller dish.
Bake for 45 minutes, or until the casserole is set and the top is lightly browned.
Remove the casserole from the water bath and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve the casserole hot, garnished with additional thyme if desired.
Let the casserole rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
Refrigerate any leftovers for up to 3 days.
